focus.feature: distribution/feed Phase 3 recommend (RECOMMEND/POPULAR/NEIGHBORS + gorse + fallback latest)

observations: Existing follow feed (FOLLOW) is implemented in domain FeedService: inbox/outbox/pool merge with cursor=postId; must not break this userspace behavior.
Negative feedback repository already supports both postId and postType sets in Redis; RECOMMEND can reuse it for filtering.
RabbitMQ topology patterns already exist: feed fanout has DLQ; interaction.notify has DLQ; independent queues are required to avoid consumers stealing messages.
